vendor_upgrades.name: Iron Constitution
vendor_upgrades.description: Reinforced chest binding. Absorbs 20 extra points of punishment per level.
vendor_upgrades.lore_note: Genn keeps these behind the counter. Not everyone earns one.

vendor_upgrades.name: Runner's Wrap
vendor_upgrades.description: Treated ankle bindings. Your lungs last 10 points longer when it matters.
vendor_upgrades.lore_note: More stamina means more dodges. More dodges means more living.

vendor_upgrades.name: Honed Edge
vendor_upgrades.description: Weighted grip tape. Your strikes carry 15% more force per level.
vendor_upgrades.lore_note: The last extractor who used this made it to the Outer twice.

vendor_upgrades.name: Steady Nerve
vendor_upgrades.description: Dampening weave for your boots. Holds you upright when they try to break your stance.
vendor_upgrades.lore_note: Flinching gets people killed out there. This helps.
